title: Small beginnings that slowly became a clear direction.
description: This section captures the early sparks: the software engineering lab, cross-platform experiments, and the habit of thinking clearly before writing code.

items.title: Starting from RPL
items.text: The first foundation was built at SMK Negeri 1 Cimahi: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Laravel, RESTful APIs, and a system-thinking mindset.

items.title: Cross-platform experiments
items.text: Explored Android Studio with Java and Kotlin, Arduino Uno basics, jQuery, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, and interface mockups in Figma.

items.title: PM by day, mentor by choice
items.text: While coordinating a dev team as Project Manager, I also guided PKL interns — breaking down tasks, reviewing their work, and making sure they shipped something they were proud of.
